function.name: initiate_ra_proc
function.signature: void initiate_ra_proc(module_id_t module_idP, int CC_id, frame_t frameP, sub_frame_t subframeP, uint16_t preamble_index, int16_t timing_offset, uint16_t ra_rnti, uint8_t rach_resource_type )

bug.description: missing mutex lock around critical section accessing shared state

prompt:
There is a missing mutex lock around critical section accessing shared state downstream of function initiate_ra_proc in the openair2/LAYER2/MAC subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/MAC/eNB_scheduler_RA.c:1276.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
